description: Verification defaults shipped with TensorCash desktop clients
note: This file is informational. The active setting is `validatorhttpurl` in bitcoin.conf (or the VALIDATOR_HTTP_URL / VALIDATOR_API_KEY environment variables). Desktop wallets (`validationapi=desktop`) run quick verification locally and use the keyless, read-only public lookup below for proof-status queries. No API key is needed for that; the startup notice about VALIDATOR_API_KEY only matters for nodes that submit authenticated verification requests (miners / validators).

publicStatusLookup.notes: Read-only verdict lookup edge. Not a writable validator. No trailing slash.

regtest.notes: Regtest uses -validationapi=mock by default; no remote endpoint is contacted.

privateValidator.notes: To use your own or a third-party authenticated validator instead, set `validatorhttpurl` plus `validatorapikey` in bitcoin.conf, or the VALIDATOR_HTTP_URL / VALIDATOR_API_KEY environment variables.
